zh.Domfront, Orne, Normandy, France: 法國諾門迪奧內多福洛特
zh.Maine, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Franc: 法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Aveline Goth於1066年出生在法國諾門迪奧內多福洛特時，她的父親William of Goth31歲，母親Gunhild Olafsdottir22歲。她於1084年與Adrian de Lucy在法國諾門迪奧內盧瑟結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1101年在法國諾門迪享年35歲。

zh-hans.Domfront, Orne, Normandy, France: 法国諾門迪奧內多福洛特
zh-hans.Maine, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Franc: 法国波特-哈倫斯哈倫特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aveline Goth于1066年出生在法国諾門迪奧內多福洛特时，她的父亲William of Goth31岁，母亲Gunhild Olafsdottir22岁。她于1084年与Adrian de Lucy在法国諾門迪奧內盧瑟结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1101年在法国諾門迪享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Goth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German and Danish: ethnic name from medieval German Gote ‘Goth’.
English (Lancashire): variant of   Goad  , alternatively, a variant of   Gath  .

variants.name: Gott
meanings: German: from a short form of the various ancient Germanic compound personal names with the first element gōd ‘good’ or god, got ‘god’.
South German and Swiss German (also Gött): relationship name or nickname from Middle High German got(t)e ‘godfather’. Compare Goett .

English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): from the Middle English personal name Gotte. In some cases this was a pet form of Godfrey . It may also have been a pet form of other names beginning with God-, such as Goddard and Godwin . Gotte was also a simplified pronunciation of the Anglo-Norman French personal name Goz, Gots (ancient Germanic Gozzo), often used as a pet form of the Old French personal name Gocelin, which was pronounced Gotselin; see Joslin .

nameMeanings.name: Aveline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It seems to represent an Old French pet form of the Germanic name   Avila   (a derivative of   Avis  ), but it could also be an elaborated form of   Ava .

en.lifeSummary: When Aveline Goth was born in 1066, in Domfront, Orne, Normandy, France, her father, William of Goth, was 31 and her mother, Gunhild Olafsdottir, was 22. She married Adrian de Lucy in 1084, in Lucé, Orne, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1101, in Normandy, France, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aveline Goth est née en 1066, à Domfront, Orne, Normandie, France, son père, William of Goth, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Gunhild Olafsdottir, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Adrian de Lucy en 1084, à Lucé, Orne, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1101, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aveline Goth 1066 in Domfront, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William of Goth 31 und ihre Mutter Gunhild Olafsdottir 22. Sie hat 1084 in Lucé, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich Adrian de Lucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1101 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aveline Goth è nata il nel 1066 nel Domfront, Orne, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, William of Goth, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Gunhild Olafsdottir, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Adrian de Lucy nel 1084, nel Lucé, Orne, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1101, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aveline Gothが1066年にフランスノーマンディオルンドムフロントで生まれた時，父William of Gothは31歳，母Gunhild Olafsdottirは22歳であった。1084年にフランスノーマンディオルンルクeでAdrian de Lucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1101年にフランスノーマンディで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aveline Goth(이)가 1066년 프랑스 노먼디 른 돔프론트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William of Goth(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gunhild Olafsdottir(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1084년 프랑스 노먼디 른 뤼ce에서 Adrian de Lucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1101년 프랑스 노먼디에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aveline Goth nasceu em 1066, em Domfront, Orne, Normandie, França, seu pai, William of Goth, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Gunhild Olafsdottir, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Adrian de Lucy em 1084, em Lucé, Orne, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1101, em Normandie, França, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aveline Goth родилась в 1066 г. в местности домфронт, орн, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени William of Goth было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Gunhild Olafsdottir, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adrian de Lucy в 1084 г. в местности лукe, орн, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1101 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aveline Goth nació en 1066, en Domfront, Orne, Normandie, Francia, su papá, William of Goth, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Gunhild Olafsdottir, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Adrian de Lucy en 1084, en Lucé, Orne, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1101, en Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 35 años.
